op.text: [as of 2025-08-16] VP Elaine offered Dana a formal director promotion on Thursday (approximately 2025-08-14) to head a merged product org with doubled org chart; Dana asked for time to think and declined over the weekend, citing bad timing due to interoperability platform's fragile stabilization phase and ongoing incident escalation responsibilities; Elaine indicated the door remains open and Dana could raise her hand again in spring 2026

op.note: Dana deferred a director promotion she described as 'the rung I've been climbing toward for years' and 'the obvious next move' — said six months ago she would have accepted immediately but now finds the prospect 'exhausting rather than exciting'; attributes this to 'grief-brain' and the cumulative weight of the year (mom, ankle, Austin uncertainty); explicitly frames this as potentially temporary ('ask me in the spring') rather than a fundamental shift in ambition
